features.name: reduction_or_with_bitwise_or_constant_from_concat_index
features.description: Code should include a reduction OR expression combined with bitwise OR with a constant result derived from unary NOT on a bit index accessed from a concatenation with zero-extended bits

features.name: concat_zero_ext_bit_index_access
features.description: Code should include a bit index access on a concatenation expression where the accessed bit is a zero-extended constant due to concatenation with zero
